wger public API (https://wger.de/api/v2/equipment/) confirmed equipment id 3 is 'Dumbbell'. Verifier checks if any selected exercise equipment string contains this value.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the wger gym application is seeded with a synthetic 'Push-Pull-Legs' routine via setup_task.sh. The public wger API confirms that 'Dumbbell' is a valid equipment type (ID 3) and 'Biceps brachii' / 'Biceps' is a valid muscle (ID 1), aligning with the requirements in the prompt and effectively checked by the verifier.py logic.
